summary:
Found the needle! **Fixed the off-by-one pagination bug** in `/app/app/app.py`.

**The Bug:**
```python
offset = (page - 1) * per_page - (1 if page > 1 else 0)
```

The extra subtraction for pages > 1 caused:
- Page 1: offset 0, returned items 0-9 (IDs 1-10) ✓
- Page 2: offset `(2-1)*10 - 1 = 9`, returned items 9-18 (IDs 10-19) ✗

This resulted in ID 10 appearing on both pages (overlap/gap at boundaries).

**The Fix:** Use standard pagination formula:
```python
offset = (page - 1) * per_page
```

- Page 1: offset 0, returns items 0-9 (IDs 1-10)
- Page 2: offset 10, returns items 10-19 (IDs 11-20) ✓

Test passes now!
